title: Methods providing system information validation for npn ues and related wireless devices
abstract: Methods of operating a wireless device are discussed. A primary SIB is acquired (5005) from a cell of a wireless communication network over a radio interface, and the primary SIB includes a plurality of network identifiers associated with the cell. A validation network identifier to be used for validation of a stored version of a secondary SIB is selected (5009) from the plurality of network identifiers included in the primary SIB, where the stored version of the secondary SIB was saved at the wireless device before acquiring the primary SIB. A network identifier associated with the stored version of the secondary SIB is compared (5015) with the validation network identifier. Whether to use the stored version of the SIB is determined (5019) based on comparing the network identifier associated with the stored version of the secondary SIB with the validation network identifier. According to some embodiments, a SNPN identifier of the cell is selected as the validation network identifier.
claims:
Claims CLAIMS: 1. A method of operating a wireless device, the method comprising: acquiring (5005) a primary system information block, SIB, from a cell of a wireless communication network over a radio interface, wherein the primary SIB includes a plurality of network identifiers associated with the cell; selecting (5009) a validation network identifier to be used for validation of a stored version of a secondary SIB, wherein the validation network identifier is selected from the plurality of network identifiers included in the primary SIB, and wherein the stored version of the secondary SIB was saved at the wireless device before acquiring the primary SIB, wherein selecting the validation network identifier comprises selecting a standalone non-public network, SNPN, identifier of the cell from the plurality of network identifiers associated with the cell as the validation network identifier; comparing (5015, 5015b-l, 5015c-l, 5015d-l, 5015e-l)a network identifier associated with the stored version of the secondary SIB with the validation network identifier, wherein the network identifier associated with the stored version of the secondary SIB comprises a SNPN identifier associated with the stored version of the secondary SIB, and wherein comparing comprises comparing the SNPN identifier associated with the stored version of the secondary SIB with the SNPN identifier of the cell selected as the validation network identifier; and determining (5019) whether to use the stored version of the SIB based on comparing the network identifier associated with the stored version of the secondary SIB with the validation network identifier 2. The method of Claim 1, wherein selecting comprises selecting the SNPN identifier of the cell as the validation network identifier responsive to the cell being an SNPN-only cell. 3. The method of any of Claims 1-2, wherein the SNPN identifier associated with the stored version of the secondary SIB includes a combination of a public land mobile network, PLMN, identifier, and a network identifier, NID, associated with the stored version of the secondary SIB, wherein the SNPN identifier of the cell includes a PLMN identifier and a NID associated with the cell, and wherein comparing comprises comparing the NID associated with the stored version of the secondary SIB with the NID associated with the cell. 4. The method of any of Claims 1-3, wherein the SNPN identifier of the cell is one of a plurality of SNPN identifiers associated with the cell included in the primary SIB, and wherein the SNPN identifier of the cell is a first SNPN identifier of the cell that is included before any other SNPN identifiers in the primary SIB. 5. A method of operating a wireless device, the method comprising: acquiring (6005) a primary system information block, SIB, from a cell of a wireless communication network over a radio interface, wherein the primary SIB includes a plurality of network identifiers associated with the cell; selecting (6009) a validation network identifier to be used for validation of a stored version of a secondary SIB, wherein the validation network identifier is selected from the plurality of network identifiers included in the primary SIB, and wherein the stored version of the secondary SIB was saved at the wireless device before acquiring the primary SIB, wherein selecting the validation network identifier comprises selecting a public land mobile network, PLMN, identifier of the cell from the plurality of network identifiers associated with the cell as the validation network identifier responsive to the cell providing public network integrated non public network service; comparing (6015, 6015b-l, 6015c-l, 6015d-l, 6015e-l) a network identifier associated with the stored version of the secondary SIB with the validation network identifier, wherein the network identifier associated with the stored version of the second SIB comprises a PLMN identifier associated with the stored version of the secondary SIB, and wherein comparing comprises comparing the PLMN identifier associated with the stored version of the secondary SIB with the PLMN identifier of the cell selected as the validation network identifier; and determining (6019) whether to use the stored version of the SIB based on comparing the network identifier associated with the stored version of the secondary SIB with the validation network identifier. 6. The method of Claim 5, wherein the PLMN identifier comprises a portion of a public network integrated non-public network, PNI-NPN, identifier. 7. The method of any of Claims 5-6, wherein the PLMN identifier of the cell is one of a plurality of PLMN identifiers associated with the cell included in the primary SIB, and wherein the PLMN identifier of the cell is a first PLMN identifier of the cell included before any other PLMN identifiers in the primary SIB. 8. The method of any of Claims 1-7, wherein determining comprises determining to use the stored version of the secondary SIB responsive to the network identifier associated with the stored version of the secondary SIB matching the validation network identifier. \ 9. The method of Claim 8 further comprising: comparing (5015b-2, 6015b-2) a time duration that the secondary SIB has been saved at the wireless device with a threshold time duration; wherein determining comprises determining to use the stored version of the secondary SIB responsive to the network identifier associated with the stored version of the secondary SIB matching the validation network identifier and responsive to the time duration that the secondary SIB has been saved at the wireless device being less than the threshold time duration. 10. The method of any of Claims 8-9 further comprising: comparing (5015c-2, 6015c-2) a cell identifier associated with the stored version of the secondary SIB with a cell identifier of the cell from the primary SIB, wherein the cell identifier of the cell from the primary SIB is associated with validation network identifier; wherein determining comprises determining to use the stored version of the secondary SIB responsive to the network identifier associated with the stored version of the secondary SIB matching the validation network identifier of the cell and responsive to the cell identifier associated with the stored version of the secondary SIB matching the cell identifier of the cell from the primary SIB. 11. The method of Claim 10, wherein comparing comprises comparing the cell identifier associated with the stored version of the secondary SIB with the cell identifier of the cell from the primary SIB responsive to an absence of an associated area scope flag. 12. The method of any of Claims 8-9 further comprising: comparing (5015d-2, 6015d-2) an area identifier associated with the stored version of the secondary SIB with an area identifier of the of the cell from the primary SIB; wherein determining comprises determining to use the stored version of the secondary SIB responsive to the network identifier associated with the stored version of the secondary SIB matching the validation network identifier and responsive to the area identifier associated with the stored version of the secondary SIB matching the area identifier of the cell from the primary SIB. 13. The method of Claim 12, wherein comparing comprises comparing the area identifier associated with the stored version of the secondary SIB with the area identifier of the cell from the primary SIB responsive to a presence of an associated area scope flag. 14. The method of any of Claims 8-13 further comprising: comparing (5015e-2, 6015e-2) a value tag associated with the stored version of the secondary SIB with a corresponding value tag from the primary SIB; wherein determining comprises determining to use the stored version of the secondary SIB responsive to the network identifier associated with the stored version of the secondary SIB matching the validation network identifier and responsive to the value tag associated with the stored version of the secondary SIB matching the corresponding value tag from the primary SIB. 15. The method of any of Claims 1-7, wherein determining comprises determining to not use the stored version of the secondary SIB responsive to the network identifier associated with the stored version of the secondary SIB not matching the validation network identifier. 16. A wireless device (300) comprising: processing circuitry (303); and memory (305) coupled with the processing circuitry, wherein the memory includes instructions that when executed by the processing circuitry causes the wireless device to, 

 acquire a primary system information block, SIB, from a cell of a wireless communication network over a radio interface, wherein the primary SIB includes a plurality of network identifiers associated with the cell, select a validation network identifier to be used for validation of a stored version of a secondary SIB, wherein the validation network identifier is selected from the plurality of network identifiers included in the primary SIB, and wherein the stored version of the secondary SIB was saved at the wireless device before acquiring the primary SIB, wherein selecting the validation network identifier comprises selecting a standalone non-public network, SNPN, identifier of the cell from the plurality of network identifiers associated with the cell as the validation network identifier, compare a network identifier associated with the stored version of the secondary SIB with the validation network identifier, wherein the network identifier associated with the stored version of the secondary SIB comprises a SNPN identifier associated with the stored version of the secondary SIB, and wherein comparing comprises comparing the SNPN identifier associated with the stored version of the secondary SIB with the SNPN identifier of the cell selected as the validation network identifier, and determine whether to use the stored version of the SIB based on comparing the network identifier associated with the stored version of the secondary SIB with the validation network identifier. 17. The wireless device (300) of Claim 16, wherein selecting comprises selecting the SNPN identifier of the cell as the validation network identifier responsive to the cell being an SNPN-only cell. 18. The wireless device (300) of any of Claims 16-17, wherein the SNPN identifier associated with the stored version of the secondary SIB includes a combination of a public land mobile network, PLMN, identifier, and a network identifier, NID, associated with the stored version of the secondary SIB, wherein the SNPN identifier of the cell includes a PLMN identifier and a NID associated with the cell, and wherein comparing comprises comparing the NID associated with the stored version of the secondary SIB with the NID associated with the cell. 19. The wireless device (300) of any of Claims 16-18, wherein the SNPN identifier of the cell is one of a plurality of SNPN identifiers associated with the cell included in the primary SIB, and wherein the SNPN identifier of the cell is a first SNPN identifier of the cell that is included before any other SNPN identifiers in the primary SIB. 20. A wireless device (300) comprising: processing circuitry (303); and memory (305) coupled with the processing circuitry, wherein the memory includes instructions that when executed by the processing circuitry causes the wireless device to, acquire a primary system information block, SIB, from a cell of a wireless communication network over a radio interface, wherein the primary SIB includes a plurality of network identifiers associated with the cell, select a validation network identifier to be used for validation of a stored version of a secondary SIB, wherein the validation network identifier is selected from the plurality of network identifiers included in the primary SIB, and wherein the stored version of the secondary SIB was saved at the wireless device before acquiring the primary SIB, wherein selecting the validation network identifier comprises selecting a public land mobile network, PLMN, identifier of the cell from the plurality of network identifiers associated with the cell as the validation network identifier responsive to the cell providing public network integrated non-public network service, compare a network identifier associated with the stored version of the secondary SIB with the validation network identifier, wherein the network identifier associated with the stored version of the second SIB comprises a PLMN identifier associated with the stored version of the secondary SIB, and wherein comparing comprises comparing the PLMN identifier associated with the stored version of the secondary SIB with the PLMN identifier of the cell selected as the validation network identifier, and determine whether to use the stored version of the SIB based on comparing the network identifier associated with the stored version of the secondary SIB with the validation network identifier. 21. The wireless device (300) of Claim 20, wherein the PLMN identifier comprises a portion of a public network integrated non-public network, PNI-NPN, identifier. 22. The wireless device (300) of any of Claims 20-21, wherein the PLMN identifier of the cell is one of a plurality of PLMN identifiers associated with the cell included in the primary SIB, and wherein the PLMN identifier of the cell is a first PLMN identifier of the cell included before any other PLMN identifiers in the primary SIB. 23. The wireless device (300) of any of Claims 16-22, wherein determining comprises determining to use the stored version of the secondary SIB responsive to the network identifier associated with the stored version of the secondary SIB matching the validation network identifier. 24. The wireless device (300) of Claim 23, wherein the memory includes instructions that when executed by the processing circuitry causes the wireless device to, compare a time duration that the secondary SIB has been saved at the wireless device with a threshold time duration; wherein determining comprises determining to use the stored version of the secondary SIB responsive to the network identifier associated with the stored version of the secondary SIB matching the validation network identifier and responsive to the time duration that the secondary SIB has been saved at the wireless device being less than the threshold time duration. 25. The wireless device (300) of any of Claims 23-24, wherein the memory includes instructions that when executed by the processing circuitry causes the wireless device to, compare a cell identifier associated with the stored version of the secondary SIB with a cell identifier of the cell from the primary SIB, wherein the cell identifier of the cell from the primary SIB is associated with validation network identifier; wherein determining comprises determining to use the stored version of the secondary SIB responsive to the network identifier associated with the stored version of the secondary SIB matching the validation network identifier of the cell and responsive to the cell 

identifier associated with the stored version of the secondary SIB matching the cell identifier of the cell from the primary SIB. 26. The wireless device (300) of Claim 25, wherein comparing comprises comparing the cell identifier associated with the stored version of the secondary SIB with the cell identifier of the cell from the primary SIB responsive to an absence of an associated area scope flag. 27. The wireless device (300) of any of Claims 23-24, wherein the memory includes instructions that when executed by the processing circuitry causes the wireless device to, compare an area identifier associated with the stored version of the secondary SIB with an area identifier of the of the cell from the primary SIB; wherein determining comprises determining to use the stored version of the secondary SIB responsive to the network identifier associated with the stored version of the secondary SIB matching the validation network identifier and responsive to the area identifier associated with the stored version of the secondary SIB matching the area identifier of the cell from the primary SIB. 28. The wireless device (300) of Claim 27, wherein comparing comprises comparing the area identifier associated with the stored version of the secondary SIB with the area identifier of the cell from the primary SIB responsive to a presence of an associated area scope flag. 29. The wireless device (300) of any of Claims 23-28 wherein the memory includes instructions that when executed by the processing circuitry causes the wireless device to, compare a value tag associated with the stored version of the secondary SIB with a corresponding value tag from the primary SIB; wherein determining comprises determining to use the stored version of the secondary SIB responsive to the network identifier associated with the stored version of the secondary SIB matching the validation network identifier and responsive to the value tag associated with the stored version of the secondary SIB matching the corresponding value tag from the primary SIB. 30. The wireless device (300) of any of Claims 16-22, wherein determining comprises determining to not use the stored version of the secondary SIB responsive to the network identifier associated with the stored version of the secondary SIB not matching the validation network identifier. 31. A wireless device (300) adapted to perform a method according to any of Claims 1- 15. 32. A computer program comprising program code to be executed by processing circuitry (303) of a wireless device (300), whereby execution of the program code causes the wireless device (300) to perform operations according to any of Claims 1-15. 33. A computer program product comprising a non-transitory storage medium including program code to be executed by processing circuitry (303) of a wireless device (300), whereby execution of the program code causes the wireless device (300) to perform operations according to any of Claims 1-15.
